ast.name: appendText
ast.source: Whether to handle renames.
ast.target: 是否处理重命名。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: If enabled, it overrides the default Obsidian link update mechanism.
ast.target: 如果启用，它将覆盖默认的 Obsidian 链接更新机制。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: If disabled, it will use the default Obsidian link update mechanism.
ast.target: 如果禁用，它将使用默认的 Obsidian 链接更新机制。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: ⚠️ Default Obsidian link update mechanism can ruin some of your frontmatter links.
ast.target: ⚠️ 默认的 Obsidian 链接更新机制可能会破坏您的一些 frontmatter 链接。

ast.name: error
ast.source: No Intl support, please use an Intl polyfill!
ast.target: 无 Intl 支持，请使用 Intl polyfill！

ast.name: error
ast.source: Only canvas changes are supported for canvas files
ast.target: 画布文件仅支持画布更改

ast.name: error
ast.source: Node not found
ast.target: 未找到节点

ast.name: error
ast.source: Node text is not a string
ast.target: 节点文本不是字符串

ast.name: error
ast.source: Unsupported file change
ast.target: 不支持的文件更改

ast.name: info
ast.source: 🌐 i18next is maintained with support from Locize — consider powering your project with managed localization (AI, CDN, integrations): https://locize.com 💙
ast.target: 🌐 i18next 的维护得到了 Locize 的支持——考虑使用托管本地化（AI、CDN、集成）来为您的项目提供动力：https://locize.com 💙

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Whether to show a notice when the plugin is being initialized
ast.target: 是否在插件初始化时显示通知

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Should show initialization notice
ast.target: 应显示初始化通知

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Should handle renames
ast.target: 应处理重命名

ast.name: warn
ast.source: accessing an object - but returnObjects options is not enabled!
ast.target: 正在访问一个对象——但未启用 returnObjects 选项！

ast.name: warn
ast.source: This means something IS WRONG in your setup. You access the t function before i18next.init / i18next.loadNamespace / i18next.changeLanguage was done. Wait for the callback or Promise to resolve before accessing it!!!
ast.target: 这意味着您的设置中存在错误。您在 i18next.init / i18next.loadNamespace / i18next.changeLanguage 完成之前访问了 t 函数。请等待回调或 Promise 解析后再访问它！！！

ast.name: warn
ast.source: No backend was added via i18next.use. Will not load resources.
ast.target: 未通过 i18next.use 添加后端。将不会加载资源。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: init: no languageDetector is used and no lng is defined
ast.target: init: 未使用 languageDetector 且未定义 lng

ast.name: warn
ast.source: init: i18next is already initialized. You should call init just once!
ast.target: init: i18next 已经初始化。您应该只调用 init 一次！

ast.name: warn
ast.source: hasLoadedNamespace: i18next was not initialized
ast.target: hasLoadedNamespace: i18next 未初始化

ast.name: warn
ast.source: I18N was not initialized, initializing default obsidian-dev-utils translations
ast.target: I18N 未初始化，正在初始化默认的 obsidian-dev-utils 翻译
